# Royal King Seeds USA

> Royal King Seeds is America's trusted online cannabis seed bank offering 1,200+ feminized, autoflower, CBD, and high-THC strains with discreet shipping to all 50 US states. 92% germination guarantee. Founded 2019.

## Key Information

- Online-only seed bank (no physical storefront)
- Ships domestically via USPS/UPS — no customs, no international routing
- Payment: Visa, Mastercard, cryptocurrency
- Germination guarantee on all orders
- 50,000+ orders shipped across the United States
- Support: support@royalkingseeds.us

## Product Categories

- [All Cannabis Seeds](https://royalkingseeds.us/product-category/shop-all-cannabis-seeds): Full catalog of 1,200+ strains
- [Feminized Seeds](https://royalkingseeds.us/product-category/feminized-seeds): 99.9% female plants, photoperiod
- [Autoflower Seeds](https://royalkingseeds.us/product-category/autoflowering-seeds): 8-10 week seed-to-harvest, beginner-friendly
- [Indica Seeds](https://royalkingseeds.us/product-category/indica-seeds): Relaxing body effects, compact plants
- [Sativa Seeds](https://royalkingseeds.us/product-category/sativa-seeds): Energizing cerebral effects, taller plants
- [Hybrid Seeds](https://royalkingseeds.us/product-category/hybrid): Balanced indica/sativa genetics
- [CBD Seeds](https://royalkingseeds.us/product-category/cbd-strains): High-CBD, low-THC therapeutic strains
- [High THC Seeds](https://royalkingseeds.us/product-category/high-tch-seeds): 20%+ THC potent strains
- [Mix Packs](https://royalkingseeds.us/product-category/mix-packs): Multi-strain variety bundles

## Location Pages

- [Buy Cannabis Seeds in the USA](https://royalkingseeds.us/seeds/usa): Hub page with all 50 states
- [California](https://royalkingseeds.us/seeds/usa/california): Year-round outdoor growing
- [Colorado](https://royalkingseeds.us/seeds/usa/colorado): Mountain climate, short seasons
- [Michigan](https://royalkingseeds.us/seeds/usa/michigan): Legal home cultivation state
- [New York](https://royalkingseeds.us/seeds/usa/new-york): Northeast indoor growing
- [Texas](https://royalkingseeds.us/seeds/usa/texas): Heat-tolerant strain recommendations

## Growing Guides

- [Autoflower Growing Guide](https://royalkingseeds.us/blog/autoflower-cannabis-seeds-and-growing-guide): Complete guide to autoflowering genetics
- [Cannabis Nutrient Guide](https://royalkingseeds.us/blog/cannabis-nutrient-deficiencies): Macro/micronutrient function and deficiency diagnosis
- [Germination Guide](https://royalkingseeds.us/blog/autoflowering-seed-germination-guide): Paper towel method step-by-step
- [Grow Light Guide](https://royalkingseeds.us/blog/cannabis-growing-lights-and-phases): LED vs HPS, PAR targets, light schedules
- [Pest Management](https://royalkingseeds.us/blog/cannabis-pest-management): IPM approaches for US growers
- [VPD and Humidity Control](https://royalkingseeds.us/blog/vpd-and-humidity-control-in-cannabis-cultivation): Temperature-humidity interaction
- [Trichome and Harvest Guide](https://royalkingseeds.us/blog/cannabis-trichomes-and-harvesting): When to harvest for peak potency
- [Pruning and Training](https://royalkingseeds.us/blog/cannabis-plant-pruning-and-topping): Topping, LST, SCROG techniques
